title: Phase I Dose-Escalation Study Combining Irinotecan-Loaded Drug-Eluting Bead Chemoembolization with Yttrium-90 Glass Microspheres Radioembolization in Colorectal Liver Metastases (DEBIR90Y).
abstract: To find the maximum tolerated dose (MTD) of yttrium-90 ( 90 Y) glass microspheres, with irinotecan-loaded drug-eluting beads (DEBIRI) in patients with colorectal liver metastases (CRLM).
